title: AI Engineer
company_focus: Enterprise AI solutions using Microsoft ecosystem
description:
Job Title: AI Engineer Experience: 8+ years Location : Local
Pune(Hybrid)

AI Solutions Engineer to design, build intelligent apps, and
operationalize AI-powered search experiences and
autonomous/assisted agents using Microsoft’s AI ecosystem

Core Technical Skills

- Overall 8-12 years of Full stack experience- . Net ecosystem
  - Must have
- 2-4 Years of experience in AI engineering
- Experience in Azure OpenAI Service, embeddings - Must have
- Azure AI Search (vector search, hybrid search, reranking)-
  Must have
- Azure Machine Learning
- Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines with Azure
  OpenAI Service
- Power platform, specifically power automate - Nice to have
- Microsoft Graph API & M365 integration - Nice to have
- Foundry - Nice to have Engineering Skills
- Designing end‑to‑end AI search and agent systems
- Implementing ingestion pipelines, chunking, metadata
  enrichment
- Understanding of Azure cloud architecture (App Service, AKS,
  Key Vault, Monitor, DevOps)
- Performance tuning (latency, token optimization, embeddings,
  caching)
- Prompt Engineering
responsibilities: Design and build intelligent applications powered by AI
Operationalize AI-powered search experiences using Azure AI Search
Build and deploy autonomous and assisted AI agents
Implement end-to-end AI search and agent systems
Design and build ingestion pipelines including chunking and metadata enrichment
Implement RAG pipelines with Azure OpenAI Service
Performance tuning for latency, token optimization, embeddings, and caching
Integrate with Azure cloud architecture services (App Service, AKS, Key Vault, Monitor, DevOps)
use_cases: RAG-based question answering and information retrieval
Intelligent document processing with ingestion pipelines
Enterprise productivity apps integrated with Microsoft 365
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and deploying AI-
powered systems including RAG pipelines, AI search
experiences, and autonomous/assisted agents using Azure
OpenAI services. The engineer is hands-on with embeddings,
vector search, prompt engineering, and end-to-end AI system
design, which clearly places it in the ai-first category.
